description: CompositionLavender top made of 100% viscose, has a boat neck, puffed cap sleeves, printed decoration on front and back and sequin highlightsFitRegularWash CareMachine or hand wash seperately with mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironLook pretty and feminine in this top from jealous 21.  Perfect to wear on a fun day out with friends, pop it on over your favourite skinny jeans and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
